member.name: T:ReduxLib.Configuration.IConfigEntry
member.summary: Represents a config entry

member.name: P:ReduxLib.Configuration.IConfigEntry.NameLocalizationKey
member.summary: The localization key for the config entry's name in the settings menu

member.name: P:ReduxLib.Configuration.IConfigEntry.DescriptionLocalizationKey
member.summary: The localization key for the config entry's description in the settings menu

member.name: P:ReduxLib.Configuration.IConfigEntry.Value
member.summary: The value of the config entry

member.name: P:ReduxLib.Configuration.IConfigEntry.Default
member.summary: The default value of the config entry

member.name: P:ReduxLib.Configuration.IConfigEntry.ValueType
member.summary: The type of the value of the config entry

member.name: M:ReduxLib.Configuration.IConfigEntry.Get``1
member.summary: Gets the value of the config entry as a specific type
member.returns: The value as the specified type

member.name: M:ReduxLib.Configuration.IConfigEntry.Set``1(``0)
member.summary: Sets the value of the config entry

member.name: P:ReduxLib.Configuration.IConfigEntry.Description
member.summary: The description of the config entry

member.name: P:ReduxLib.Configuration.IConfigEntry.Constraint
member.summary: The value constraint of the config entry

member.name: M:ReduxLib.Configuration.IConfigEntry.RegisterCallback(System.Action{System.Object,System.Object})
member.summary: Registers a callback to be called when setting the value on a config file
member.param: An action that takes the old value and the new value and calls a callback

member.name: T:ReduxLib.Configuration.Attributes.ConfigRangeAttribute
member.summary: Declares a range of values that this config value accepts

member.name: F:ReduxLib.Configuration.Attributes.ConfigRangeAttribute.Min
member.summary: The lower bound on the range of values

member.name: F:ReduxLib.Configuration.Attributes.ConfigRangeAttribute.Max
member.summary: The upper bound on the range of values

member.name: F:ReduxLib.Configuration.Attributes.ConfigRangeAttribute.Steps
member.summary: The number of slider steps in the settings menu

member.name: F:ReduxLib.Configuration.Attributes.ConfigRangeAttribute.Format
member.summary: The format string used by the settings menu slider

member.name: M:ReduxLib.Configuration.Attributes.ConfigRangeAttribute.#ctor(System.Object,System.Object,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new config range attribute with the given min and max
member.param: The amount of steps on the slider in the settings menu
The format used to display the value on the slider

member.name: M:ReduxLib.Configuration.Attributes.ConfigRangeAttribute.ToRangeConstraintTyped``1
member.summary: Converts this attribute to a range constraint of T

member.name: M:ReduxLib.Configuration.Attributes.ConfigRangeAttribute.ToRangeConstraint(System.Type)
member.summary: Converts this attribute to a list constraint of t

member.name: T:ReduxLib.Configuration.Attributes.ConfigListAttribute
member.summary: Declares a list of acceptable values for a config property

member.name: F:ReduxLib.Configuration.Attributes.ConfigListAttribute.AcceptableValues
member.summary: The list of acceptable values

member.name: M:ReduxLib.Configuration.Attributes.ConfigListAttribute.#ctor(System.Object[])
member.summary: Creates a new config list attribute with the given list of acceptable values

member.name: M:ReduxLib.Configuration.Attributes.ConfigListAttribute.ToListConstraintTyped``1
member.summary: Converts this attribute to a list constraint of T

member.name: M:ReduxLib.Configuration.Attributes.ConfigListAttribute.ToListConstraint(System.Type)
member.summary: Converts this attribute to a list constraint of t

member.name: T:ReduxLib.Configuration.Attributes.ConfigValueAttribute
member.summary: A config value attribute, used for adding a property/field into the config file

member.name: F:ReduxLib.Configuration.Attributes.ConfigValueAttribute.Name
member.summary: The name of the config property

member.name: F:ReduxLib.Configuration.Attributes.ConfigValueAttribute.Description
member.summary: The description of the config property

member.name: F:ReduxLib.Configuration.Attributes.ConfigValueAttribute.NameLocalizationKey
member.summary: The localization key for the name of the config property

member.name: F:ReduxLib.Configuration.Attributes.ConfigValueAttribute.DescriptionLocalizationKey
member.summary: The localization key for the description of the config property

member.name: M:ReduxLib.Configuration.Attributes.ConfigValueAttribute.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new config value attribute
member.param: The name of the config value
The description of the config value
The localization key for the name of the config value
The localization key for the description of the config value

member.name: T:ReduxLib.Configuration.Attributes.ConfigSectionAttribute
member.summary: Starts a section for the config file, if it is a previously defined section, everything will go there Somewhat similar to Unity's [Header(...)] attribute

member.name: F:ReduxLib.Configuration.Attributes.ConfigSectionAttribute.Name
member.summary: The name of the section

member.name: F:ReduxLib.Configuration.Attributes.ConfigSectionAttribute.LocalizationKey
member.summary: The localization key of the section

member.name: M:ReduxLib.Configuration.Attributes.ConfigSectionAttribute.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new ConfigSection attribute
member.param: The optional localization key for the section

member.name: F:ReduxLib.Configuration.ListConstraint`1.AcceptableValues
member.summary: The list of acceptable values.

member.name: M:ReduxLib.Configuration.ListConstraint`1.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0})
member.summary: Creates a new list constraint.

member.name: M:ReduxLib.Configuration.ListConstraint`1.#ctor(`0[])
member.summary: Creates a new list constraint.

member.name: T:ReduxLib.Configuration.IConfigSection
member.summary: Represents a section of a configuration file.

member.name: P:ReduxLib.Configuration.IConfigSection.Name
member.summary: The name of the section.

member.name: P:ReduxLib.Configuration.IConfigSection.LocalizationKey
member.summary: The localization key for the section

member.name: P:ReduxLib.Configuration.IConfigSection.Item(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the with the specified key.

member.name: M:ReduxLib.Configuration.IConfigSection.Bind``1(System.String,``0,System.String,ReduxLib.Configuration.IValueConstraint)
member.summary: Binds a new to the specified key within this section.
member.param: The initial constraint of the entry.

member.name: M:ReduxLib.Configuration.IConfigSection.BindEntry``1(System.String,``0,System.String,ReduxLib.Configuration.IValueConstraint,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Binds a new to the specified key within this section, with full metadata including localization keys for the settings menu.
member.param: The initial constraint of the entry.
Localization key for the entry's display name.
Localization key for the entry's description.

member.name: P:ReduxLib.Configuration.IConfigSection.Keys
member.summary: All keys defined in this section.

member.name: M:ReduxLib.Configuration.IConfigSection.Reset
member.summary: Resets every entry in this section to its default value.

member.name: T:ReduxLib.Configuration.JsonConfigEntry
member.summary: A config entry that is stored in a JSON file.

member.name: E:ReduxLib.Configuration.JsonConfigEntry.Callbacks
member.summary: The callbacks that are invoked when the value of this entry changes.

member.name: M:ReduxLib.Configuration.JsonConfigEntry.#ctor(ReduxLib.Configuration.JsonConfigFile,System.Type,System.String,System.Object,ReduxLib.Configuration.IValueConstraint,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new config entry.
member.param: Config file that this entry belongs to.

member.name: T:ReduxLib.Configuration.IConfigFile
member.summary: Represents a configuration file.

member.name: M:ReduxLib.Configuration.IConfigFile.Save
member.summary: Saves the configuration file.

member.name: P:ReduxLib.Configuration.IConfigFile.Sections
member.summary: All sections in the configuration file, in declaration order. Also indexable by section name.

member.name: M:ReduxLib.Configuration.IConfigFile.GetOrCreateSection(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the section with the given name, creating it if it doesn't exist yet.

member.name: M:ReduxLib.Configuration.IConfigFile.GetOrCreateSection(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets the section with the given name, creating it if it doesn't exist yet. If the section is being created, is used as its localization key. If the section already exists, its existing localization key is preserved.

member.name: P:ReduxLib.Configuration.IConfigFile.Item(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets the with the specified section and key.

member.name: M:ReduxLib.Configuration.IConfigFile.Bind``1(System.String,System.String,``0,System.String,ReduxLib.Configuration.IValueConstraint)
member.summary: Binds a new to the specified section and key.
member.param: The initial constraint of the entry.

member.name: M:ReduxLib.Configuration.IConfigFile.Reset
member.summary: Resets every entry in every section to its default value.

member.name: T:ReduxLib.Configuration.ConfigSectionList
member.summary: An ordered list of that is also indexable by section name.

member.name: P:ReduxLib.Configuration.ConfigSectionList.Item(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the section with the specified name.

member.name: M:ReduxLib.Configuration.ConfigSectionList.TryGet(System.String,ReduxLib.Configuration.IConfigSection@)
member.summary: Attempts to get a section by name.

member.name: M:ReduxLib.Configuration.ConfigSectionList.Contains(System.String)
member.summary: Whether a section with the given name exists.

member.name: T:ReduxLib.Configuration.IValueConstraint
member.summary: A constraint that can be applied to a to limit the values it can take.

member.name: M:ReduxLib.Configuration.IValueConstraint.IsConstrained(System.Object)
member.summary: Checks if the given object is constrained by this constraint.
member.returns: True if the object is constrained, false otherwise.

member.name: P:ReduxLib.Configuration.IValueConstraint.ConstraintDescription
member.summary: Gets a description of the constraint to put into a comment

member.name: T:ReduxLib.Configuration.ConfigDescription`1
member.summary: A fake config value that is used in the creation of defaults

member.name: M:ReduxLib.Configuration.ConfigDescription`1.#ctor(`0,ReduxLib.Configuration.ValueConstraint{`0})
member.summary: Create this fake config value, it should not be read before binding

member.name: F:ReduxLib.Configuration.ConfigDescription`1.DefaultValue
member.summary: The set default value

member.name: F:ReduxLib.Configuration.ConfigDescription`1.Constraint
member.summary: The given constraint on the value

member.name: F:ReduxLib.Configuration.ConfigDescription`1.PreRegisteredCallbacks
member.summary: Pre-registered callbacks for this config value, just to make things easier

member.summary: The value of the entry.

member.summary: Registers a callback that will be invoked when the value changes.

member.summary: A config file that uses JSON to store its data.

member.summary: Creates a new JSON config file object.

member.summary: Base class for value constraints.

member.summary: Returns true if the given value is valid for this constraint.
member.returns: True if the value is valid, false otherwise.

member.summary: The minimum value.

member.summary: A section within a .

member.name: T:ReduxLib.Messaging.MessageBus
member.summary: MessageBus that can be used to publish messages with no arguments to subscribers.

member.name: M:ReduxLib.Messaging.MessageBus.Subscribe(System.Action)
member.summary: Subscribes a handler to the MessageBus.
member.exception: Thrown when the handler is null.

member.name: M:ReduxLib.Messaging.MessageBus.Unsubscribe(System.Action)
member.summary: Unsubscribes a handler from the MessageBus.

member.name: M:ReduxLib.Messaging.MessageBus.Publish
member.summary: Publishes a message to all subscribers.
Publishes a message to all subscribers.

member.name: T:ReduxLib.Messaging.MessageBus`1
member.summary: MessageBus that can be used to publish messages with 1 argument to subscribers.

member.name: M:ReduxLib.Messaging.MessageBus`1.Subscribe(System.Action{`0})
member.summary: Subscribes a handler to the MessageBus.
member.exception: Thrown when the handler is null.

member.name: M:ReduxLib.Messaging.MessageBus`1.Unsubscribe(System.Action{`0})
member.summary: Unsubscribes a handler from the MessageBus.

member.name: M:ReduxLib.Messaging.MessageBus`1.Publish(`0)
member.summary: Publishes a message to all subscribers.

member.name: T:ReduxLib.Messaging.MessageBusBase
member.summary: A base class for MessageBus instances.

member.name: P:ReduxLib.Messaging.MessageBusBase.Name
member.summary: The name of the MessageBus.

member.name: T:ReduxLib.Messaging.MessageBusManager
member.summary: A static class that manages the creation and retrieval of MessageBus instances.

member.name: M:ReduxLib.Messaging.MessageBusManager.Add``1(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new MessageBus instance with the given name.
member.param: The name of the MessageBus to create.
member.typeparam: The type of the MessageBus to create.
member.exception: Thrown when the given name is null or empty.
Thrown when a MessageBus with the given name already exists.

member.name: M:ReduxLib.Messaging.MessageBusManager.Exists(System.String)
member.summary: Does a MessageBus with the given name exist?
member.param: The name of the MessageBus to check.
member.returns: True if a MessageBus with the given name exists, false otherwise.

member.name: M:ReduxLib.Messaging.MessageBusManager.TryGet``1(System.String,``0@)
member.summary: Gets a MessageBus instance with the given name.

member.summary: All logging.
